title: OpenStax Writing Guide
description: A source card for the OpenStax Writing Guide with Handbook.

pages.text: OpenStax Writing Guide with Handbook supports argument, analysis, research, revision, genre awareness, grammar, documentation, and source use.
Use this source when students need help turning reading into notes, claims, evidence, paragraphs, citations, and revision plans.
OpenStax books carry Creative Commons licenses. Check the linked book page for the exact license before mirroring chapters or figures.
